description_long: This is a rectangular, light wood-finished cabinet with a modern, minimalist design. The front features three open shelves in the center and two large drawers on either side, both of which are partially open, revealing spacious storage compartments. The back panel has a circular cable management hole, suggesting suitability for use as a media console or TV stand. The cabinet stands on four short, dark legs, providing stability and a slight elevation from the ground. The wood grain texture is visible across all surfaces, giving it a natural and contemporary appearance. No handles are visible, indicating a push-to-open mechanism for the drawers.
description: A modern, light wood cabinet with open shelves and two large, handleless drawers, elevated on short dark legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves and two large, partially open drawers on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet and the open left drawer.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wood panel with a circular cable management hole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open right drawer and the cabinet's wood grain texture.
